abilities.description: Enchanted land becomes a copy of the exiled card until end of turn and gains haste. It's still a land.

effect.description: Enchanted land becomes a copy of the exiled card until end of turn and gains haste. It's still a land.
effect.name: Clone

triggers.description: When CARDNAME enters, draw a card, then draft a card from CARDNAME's spellbook and exile it.
